description_long: This ornate nightstand features a rectangular body with elaborate gold-toned embellishments and sculptural details, including a prominent figurine seated atop the lid. The front face is adorned with a large, circular relief surrounded by intricate motifs and a panel with raised decorative scenes. The sides are framed with gold finials and have arched glass or panel insets, while the legs are heavily ornamented with clawed feet and baroque flourishes. The surface is finished in a dark, possibly wood or metal material, with painted or enameled floral patterns and gilded accents. The overall design is reminiscent of antique European craftsmanship, suggesting a luxurious and historical aesthetic. This piece would stand out as a statement furniture item in any setting.
description: An ornate, antique-style nightstand with gold embellishments, sculptural details, and a seated figurine on top, featuring intricate reliefs and clawed feet.
description_view_0: The front view displays the elaborate gold relief, decorative motifs, and the central circular panel, with the figurine and finials clearly visible on top.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the arched panel inset and the ornate leg design, with the figurine and finials seen in profile.
description_view_2: The rear view shows a plainer, darker surface with less ornamentation, but the finials and figurine are still visible on the top.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the arched panel inset and ornate legs, with the decorative top elements in profile.
attribute_leg_design: ornate clawed feet with baroque flourishes
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: against a wall or as a statement piece in a public or semi-public space
